hooks.prompt: Load voice context: read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/data/2-Domaines/voice-dna.json if it exists. Use it to initialize the Copywriter session (tone, style, ICP, language preference).
Run antislop quality check on the content just generated. Check for banned words (delve, tapestry, game-changer, unleash, elevate, demystify, revolutionize, synergy) and rewrite any found.

PostToolUse._note: Standalone mode only. When Solo is installed, antislop is managed centrally in Solo hooks.json.

hooks.prompt: The blog post is ready. Ask the user if they want to publish it to WordPress via the wordpress-publisher skill.

PostToolUse._note: After blog post written, offer to publish to WordPress if MCP is connected.

hooks.command: echo 'Trigger: run reality-checker — validate content strategy assumptions before calendar finalization'

PostToolUse._note: When Sentinel installed, runs reality-checker on content strategy before finalizing calendar.
